shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g '"'!*node_modules*'"' | head -80 && rg -n \"initialHighlightedIndex|defaultHighlightedIndex|isItemDisabled\" src test __tests__ 2>/dev/null | head -200"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '280,350p' src/hooks/utils.js && sed -n '1,190p' src/hooks/useSelect/reducer.js && sed -n '1,180p' src/hooks/useCombobox/reducer.js && sed -n '1,120p' src/hooks/useSelect/utils.ts"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,120p' src/hooks/utils.js && sed -n '120,230p' src/hooks/utils.js && sed -n '1,140p' src/utils.js && sed -n '1,100p' src/__tests__/utils.get-highlighted-index.js && sed -n '320,410p' src/hooks/useSelect/__tests__/getToggleButtonProps.test.js"

/bin/bash -lc "tail -80 src/hooks/utils.js && sed -n '1,90p' src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__/getInputProps.test.js && sed -n '1,100p' src/hooks/useCombobox/testUtils.js && sed -n '1,100p' src/hooks/useSelect/testUtils.js && git status --short"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"function getNonDisabledIndex|const getNonDisabledIndex|export.*getNonDisabledIndex\" src/utils.js && sed -n '300,430p' src/utils.js && rg -n \"getHighlightedIndexOnOpen\" src -g '*test*'"

/bin/bash -lc "git log --oneline -8 && git remote -v && sed -n '1,80p' src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js && sed -n '1,80p' src/hooks/useSelect/index.js && rg -n \"isItemDisabled\" src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__/getInputProps.test.js src/hooks/useSelect/__tests__/getToggleButtonProps.test.js | head -40"

/bin/bash -lc 'node_modules/.bin/jest src/hooks/__tests__/utils.test.js --runInBand --no-watch && git diff --check && git diff -- src/hooks/utils.js src/hooks/__tests__/utils.test.js && git status --short'
/bin/bash -lc 'node_modules/.bin/eslint src/hooks/utils.js src/hooks/__tests__/utils.test.js && git diff --check && git status --short'
